title: BOTOX Bee Veno Cream Firming & Facial Moisturizing Ideal for Wrinkle Removal & Recovery Skin Care Accessories
detail_text: Description: 1. Bees Venom Facial Care Ointment: The Botulinum Bees Venom Wrinkle Removal Cream is designed to lift, tighten, and restore skin vitality, reducing fine lines and wrinkles and making the skin smoother. 2. Multi purpose skin care formula: this bees venom face cream integrates anti wrinkle, firming and moisturizing. 3. Face and body firming cream: bees venom face cream can promote skin firming and make skin younger and more shiny by increasing the production of collagen. 4. Moisturize the skin: the moisturizing ingredients in the bees venom face cream can provide deep moisturizing and nourishing for the skin, making the skin soft and elastic 5. Suitable for all skin types: Our natural bees venom face cream is safe and gentle, suitable for all skin types, and is your versatile skincare for daily skin care, which can be used for face, hands, legs and neck. Specification: Size: 13 x 2 x 3 cm Weight: 40 g Package Include: 1x Bees Venom Cream
detail_html:
Description:

1. Bees Venom Facial Care Ointment: The Botulinum Bees Venom Wrinkle Removal Cream is designed to lift, tighten, and restore skin vitality, reducing fine lines and wrinkles and making the skin smoother.

2. Multi purpose skin care formula: this bees venom face cream integrates anti wrinkle, firming and moisturizing.

3. Face and body firming cream: bees venom face cream can promote skin firming and make skin younger and more shiny by increasing the production of collagen.

4. Moisturize the skin: the moisturizing ingredients in the bees venom face cream can provide deep moisturizing and nourishing for the skin, making the skin soft and elastic

5. Suitable for all skin types: Our natural bees venom face cream is safe and gentle, suitable for all skin types, and is your versatile skincare for daily skin care, which can be used for face, hands, legs and neck.


Specification:

Size: 13 x 2 x 3 cm

Weight: 40 g


Package Include:

1x Bees Venom Cream

title: [Local Stock] CeraVe Anti-aging Night Cream for Face, Skin Renewing Night Cream with Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide,Facial Moisturizer Fragrance Free 48g
detail_text: Skin Renewing Night Cream Product Technology Developed with dermatologists, Skin Renewing Night Cream is designed to work with your natural circadian rhythm to help restore your skin barrier overnight when it's most receptive. Wake up to skin that looks refreshed and renewed. With ceramides 1, 3 and 6-II Hyaluronic acid to help retain skin's moisture Niacinamide Non-comedogenic Fragrance-free Gentle, non-irritating formula Skin Renewing Night Cream is formulated to restore the skin barrier overnight, so you can wake up with skin that looks refreshed and renewed. This nongreasy formula contains an exclusive ceramide and peptide complex, along with kollaren and chronoline to help reduce the look of fine lines and wrinkles and support skin elasticity. Ceramides, hyaluronic acid and niacinamide work to provide intense hydration while helping to repair and restore the protective skin barrier. Ideal for all skin types, Skin Renewing Night Cream features an exclusive complex of biomimetic peptides that work to refresh tired-looking skin, hyaluronic acid to help the skin retain moisture and three essential ceramides that restore and reinforce the skin’s barrier while you sleep. This non-greasy, intensely moisturizing skin renewing night cream is designed to improve the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and patented MVE Delivery Technology provides the skin with 24-hour nourishment—so you can wake up looking rested and rejuvenated. [ EXCLUSIVE PEPTIDE COMPLEX ] Helps soften and renew the look of tired skin overnight [ ESSENTIAL CERAMIDES ] Formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) help to restore the protective skin barrier [ PATENTED TECHNOLOGY ] Utilizes patented MVE controlled-release technology to help replenish ceramides and deliver long lasting moisturization [ GENTLE ON SKIN ] Fragrance free, non-greasy [ RICH TEXTURE ] Ideal for normal to oily skin How to Use Apply in small dots where needed around the face Gently smooth until thoroughly absorbed Use nightly before bedtime
detail_html:
Skin Renewing Night Cream Product Technology Developed with dermatologists, Skin Renewing Night Cream is designed to work with your natural circadian rhythm to help restore your skin barrier overnight when it's most receptive. Wake up to skin that looks refreshed and renewed. With ceramides 1, 3 and 6-II Hyaluronic acid to help retain skin's moisture Niacinamide Non-comedogenic Fragrance-free Gentle, non-irritating formula

Skin Renewing Night Cream is formulated to restore the skin barrier overnight, so you can wake up with skin that looks refreshed and renewed. This nongreasy formula contains an exclusive ceramide and peptide complex, along with kollaren and chronoline to help reduce the look of fine lines and wrinkles and support skin elasticity. Ceramides, hyaluronic acid and niacinamide work to provide intense hydration while helping to repair and restore the protective skin barrier.

Ideal for all skin types, Skin Renewing Night Cream features an exclusive complex of biomimetic peptides that work to refresh tired-looking skin, hyaluronic acid to help the skin retain moisture and three essential ceramides that restore and reinforce the skin’s barrier while you sleep. This non-greasy, intensely moisturizing skin renewing night cream is designed to improve the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and patented MVE Delivery Technology provides the skin with 24-hour nourishment—so you can wake up looking rested and rejuvenated.

[ EXCLUSIVE PEPTIDE COMPLEX ] Helps soften and renew the look of tired skin overnight

[ ESSENTIAL CERAMIDES ] Formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) help to restore the protective skin barrier

[ PATENTED TECHNOLOGY ] Utilizes patented MVE controlled-release technology to help replenish ceramides and deliver long lasting moisturization

[ GENTLE ON SKIN ] Fragrance free, non-greasy

[ RICH TEXTURE ] Ideal for normal to oily skin

How to Use

Apply in small dots where needed around the face

Gently smooth until thoroughly absorbed

Use nightly before bedtime

Ceramides, hyaluronic acid and niacinamide work to provide intense hydration while helping to repair and restore the protective skin barrier.Ideal for all skin types, Skin Renewing Night Cream features an exclusive complex of biomimetic peptides that work to refresh tired-looking skin, hyaluronic acid to help the skin retain moisture and three essential ceramides that restore and reinforce the skin’s barrier while you sleep. This non-greasy, intensely moisturizing skin renewing night cream is designed to improve the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and patented MVE Delivery Technology provides the skin with 24-hour nourishment—so you can wake up looking rested and rejuvenated.[ EXCLUSIVE PEPTIDE COMPLEX ] Helps soften and renew the look of tired skin overnight[ ESSENTIAL CERAMIDES ] Formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) help to restore the protective skin barrier[ PATENTED TECHNOLOGY ] Utilizes patented MVE controlled-release technology to help replenish ceramides and deliver long lasting moisturization[ GENTLE ON SKIN ] Fragrance free, non-greasy[ RICH TEXTURE ] Ideal for normal to oily skinHow to UseApply in small dots where needed around the faceGently smooth until thoroughly absorbedUse nightly before bedtime

title: Citra Sakura Glow Facial Moisturizer 40g
detail_text: Sakura is known as a valuable ingredient used in Asia for generations to help give a glowing face thanks to its rich antioxidant content. Sakura Fair UV images bring natural energy to natural light, just like Sakura's newly formed flower buds. title: BSKM Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream Facial Moisturizer Brightening Anti-Aging Wrinkle Nourishing Skin Soothing & Restorative SkinCare 50g
detail_text: 1. Deep moisturizing: hyaluronic acid is a potent humectant that absorbs and locks moisture into the skin, keeping it hydrated and smooth. 2. Improve elasticity: Hyaluronic acid can increase the elasticity of the skin, reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and make the skin firmer and younger. 3. Antioxidant: Scutellaria Baicalensis Root Extract and Licorice Root Extract are rich in antioxidants, which can help protect against free radical damage and slow down the aging process of the skin. 4. Soothing and Repairing: Ingredients in Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream can soothe sensitive skin, reduce redness and inflammation, and promote skin repair and recovery. 5. Gentle and non-irritating: Hyaluronic acid face creams are usually mild and non-irritating formulas that are suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Steps of use: 1. Cleanse your face: Start by cleansing your face with lukewarm water to ensure your skin is clean. 2. Take an appropriate amount of Face Cream: Take an appropriate amount of Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream and gently apply it to the face and neck, avoiding the eye area.
detail_html:
1. Deep moisturizing: hyaluronic acid is a potent humectant that absorbs and locks moisture into the skin, keeping it hydrated and smooth.

2. Improve elasticity: Hyaluronic acid can increase the elasticity of the skin, reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and make the skin firmer and younger.

2. Take an appropriate amount of Face Cream: Take an appropriate amount of Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream and gently apply it to the face and neck, avoiding the eye area.

title: CeraVe Facial Moisturizing Lotion PM Ultra Lightweight, Night Face Moisturizer 89ML
detail_text: AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion SPF 30, 89ml • A micro-fine zinc oxide sunscreen for UVA/UVB protection. This CeraVe moisturizer with SPF is a hydrating facial lotion that spreads easily, is absorbed quickly, and leaves a non-greasy finish • Use this daily face sunscreen as the last step in a morning skincare routine. If layering with an eye cream, moisturizer or facial serum, apply Cerave AM facial lotion after other product applications have been fully absorbed • Contains Hyaluronic Acid to retain skin's moisture and Niacinamide to help calm skin. MVE Technology delivers hydration throughout the day• Ceramides are found naturally in the skin and make up 50% of the lipids in the skin barrier. All CeraVe products are formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) to help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier • Recommended for daily use by the Skin Cancer Foundation. Fragrance free, oil free, non-comedogenic, paraben-free. Suitable for dry skin, sensitive skin, oily skin, and acne-prone skin

𝐆𝐞𝐭 𝐬𝐦𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡, 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝-𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧 𝐚𝐬 𝐌𝐲𝐫𝐚 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐌𝐨𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐫 𝐢𝐬:



💦𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐌𝐨𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐁𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐝 𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧

💦𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝟓 𝐄𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐁𝐞𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐲 𝐕𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐝𝐞𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐲 𝐧𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡𝐲 𝐠𝐥𝐨𝐰

💦𝐖𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐋𝐮𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐚 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐱 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐚𝐬 𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐬 𝟕 𝐝𝐚𝐲𝐬

💦𝐇𝐚𝐬 𝐕𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐧 𝐂 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐍𝐢𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩𝐬 𝐟𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐲 𝐝𝐚𝐫𝐤 𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐭𝐬

💦𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐝𝐨𝐮𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐔𝐕 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐦𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐫𝐚𝐲𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐧

title: The Ordinary Facial Moisturizer Cream Natural Moisturizing Factors + HA 30ML/60ML
detail_text: Natural Moisturizing Factors + HA is a moisturizer that works with your skin to support its natural hydration barrier. By using a collection of - Free from Alcohol, Silicone, Oil, Fragrance & Gluten; Cruelty free & Vegan Ingredients: that appear naturally in your skin—such as amino acids, fatty acids, triglycerides, urea, ceramides, phospholipids, glycerine, saccharides, sodium PCA, and hyaluronic acid—this cream keeps the outer layer of your skin protected and well-hydrated, without feeling greasy. Plus, it provides both immediate and lasting effects, as it works to significantly improve skin barrier function with regular use. Connect Copy: Surface Hydration | Barrier Support Clinical results available: - Tested on 33 participants over 28 days 4 weeks - Supports the skin barrier and provides immediate hydration* - Non-irritating and non-sensitizing as seen in our clinical test of n=115 - Non-comedogenic How to use: - Apply as needed. - If irritation occurs, rinse off, cease use, and consult a physician. - Use only as directed on unbroken skin. - Patch testing prior to use is advised. - Keep out of reach of children. - Free from Alcohol, Silicone, Oil, Fragrance & Gluten; Cruelty free & Vegan

detail_text: The new Myra Fresh Glow / Smooth Facial Moisturizer is now packed with more Beauty Vitamins (Vitamins E, C, B3, B5, B6): It has Beauty Vitamins®, a powerful combination of vitamins that nourishes skin. It has Pro-Radiance Complex™, which combines an oil-free formula and effective skin whitening actives. It improves skin tone in as early as 7 days while providing a shine-free complexion. Light feel and non-greasy look making it ideal for everyday use Whitens skin in 7 days Protects skin from sun damage How to Use Gently apply on face and neck after cleansing. Use morning and at night. Can be used under make-up. For best results, use with Myra Whitening Fresh Glow Facial Wash.

title: ANUA Rice 70 Intensive Moisturizing Milk, Hydrating Face Lotion, Niacinamide, Ceramides, All Types, Sensitive, Skin Moisture Barrier, Lightweight Nourishing, Korean Skincare, 5.07 fl.oz.
detail_text: This lightweight milky toner is perfect for creating a bright, glowy, glass skin complexion. Infused with rice water, niacinamide, and ceramide, this toner helps to hydrate and brighten dull, uneven skin tones. The non-sticky finish has a milky texture that hydrates and balances the sebum production. Additional key ingredients such as Betaine help to keep breakouts and irritation at bay, strengthening the skin barrier's defense against environmental stressors. 250ml
detail_html:

product.desc:
This lightweight milky toner is perfect for creating a bright, glowy, glass skin complexion. Infused with rice water, niacinamide, and ceramide, this toner helps to hydrate and brighten dull, uneven skin tones. The non-sticky finish has a milky texture that hydrates and balances the sebum production. Additional key ingredients such as Betaine help to keep breakouts and irritation at bay, strengthening the skin barrier's defense against environmental stressors.

250ml

detail_text: Myra Smooth Glow Whitening Facial Moisturizer has Beauty Vitamins®, a powerful combination of vitamins that nourishes skin. It has LuminaComplex&trade, derived from plant and vitamin extracts known for its potent whitening properties. It evens out skin tone while it hydrates skin for a dewy glow complexion. Get the light feel, smooth glowing skin with Myra! >, The new and improved Smooth Glow Whitening Facial Moisturizer is now packed with more Beauty Vitamins (Vitamins E, C, B3, B5, B6), Light feel and non-greasy making it ideal for everyday use Hydrates skin for a moist glow complexion Whitens skin in 7 days Protects skin against sun damage.

detail_text: CeraVe PM Night Moisturizing Lotion is a lightweight, nourishing night cream designed to hydrate and repair the skin's natural moisture barrier while you sleep. Enriched with niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, it replenishes moisture and soothes the skin, leaving it soft and revitalized. The oil-free and fragrance-free formula is suitable for all skin types and utilizes MVE delivery technology to continuously replenish moisture. Key Features: ● Lightweight, oil-free formula ● Contains niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and ceramides ● Fragrance-free How to Use: ● Apply to face and neck before bed, or as directed by your healthcare professional. Avoid contact with eyes.

title: Myra Fresh Glow Whitening Facial Moisturizer 40ml
detail_text: Myra Fresh Glow Whitening Facial Moisturizer has Beauty Vitamins®, a powerful combination of vitamins that nourishes skin. It has Pro-Radiance Complex&trade, which combines an oil-free formula and effective skin whitening actives. It improves skin tone in as early as 7 days while providing a shine-free complexion. Get a light feel and non-greasy, glowing skin with Myra! The new and improved Myra Fresh Glow Whitening Facial Moisturizer is now packed with more Beauty Vitamins (Vitamins E, C, B3, B5, B6) Light feel and non-greasy making it ideal for everyday use Hydrates skin for a shine-free complexion Whitens skin in 7 days Protects skin from sun damage.

title: Citra Sakura Glow Facial Moisturizer 40g Filipino Favorite
detail_text: Sakura is known as a valuable ingredient used in Asia for generations to help give a glowing face thanks to its rich antioxidant content. Sakura Fair UV images bring natural energy to natural light, just like Sakura's newly formed flower buds. Enriched with Sakura flower extracts, Vitamins B3, B6, and C&E, Sakura Fair UV Facial Moisturizer can penetrate deep into the skin and create a glowing complexion. The content protects the face from UV rays (UVA and UVB) to prevent the darkening of the skin due to sun exposure. Short description: with 100% natural Japanese Sakura essence and 10 multivitamins, for a pore-free face, 14 hours sunny and shine-free. The direction of use: For best results, use 2 times a day. title: （ Authentic ） CeraVe Ultra-Light Moisturizing Gel, Hydrating Gel Face Moisturizer For Men & For Women with Ceramides, 52ml
detail_text: [ GEL MOISTURIZER FOR FACE ] Water-based moisturizer for face with 3 essential ceramides, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid for immediate and long-lasting hydration while helping maintain the protective skin barrier. [ WEIGHTLESS FEEL ON SKIN ] This hydrating face moisturizer gel delivers powerful ingredients in a refreshing lightweight texture that is fast absorbing and non-greasy. The lightweight moisturizer for face leaves skin feeling softer and soothed. [ OIL-FREE MOISTURIZER ] Suitable for use on face and neck. This daily face moisturizer can be applied in the morning and night. Hydrating moisturizer layers well under makeup and under SPF without feeling greasy and with no pilling. [ 3 ESSENTIAL CERAMIDES ] Ceramides are found naturally in the skin and can become damaged with sun exposure. All CeraVe products are formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) to help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier. [ DEVELOPED WITH DERMATOLOGISTS ] Suitable for all skin types. Fragrance-free, paraben-free, non-comedogenic and oil-free

title: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion 89ml
detail_text: Description No matter what your skin type is—even if it’s oily—your skin needs moisture around the clock. But it may need other things too—like soothing ingredients, softer texture, and help restoring its natural moisture barrier. Incorporating a rich, yet lightweight night cream—like CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion—into your nighttime skincare routine can provide all those benefits and more. Developed with dermatologists, CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizer is formulated to lock in your skin’s moisture and help restore your skin’s natural barrier, all while you sleep. Adding this oil-free, non-comedogenic night cream to your nighttime skincare routine can help hydrate, calm, and soothe your skin, while also helping to maintain your protective skin barrier. Featuring niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, this night cream uses our MVE Technology to deliver a steady stream of much-needed moisture throughout the night, and offers an effective, yet gentle way to care for your normal to oily skin.
detail_html:
Description

No matter what your skin type is—even if it’s oily—your skin needs moisture around the clock. But it may need other things too—like soothing ingredients, softer texture, and help restoring its natural moisture barrier. Incorporating a rich, yet lightweight night cream—like CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion—into your nighttime skincare routine can provide all those benefits and more.

Developed with dermatologists, CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizer is formulated to lock in your skin’s moisture and help restore your skin’s natural barrier, all while you sleep. Adding this oil-free, non-comedogenic night cream to your nighttime skincare routine can help hydrate, calm, and soothe your skin, while also helping to maintain your protective skin barrier. Featuring niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, this night cream uses our MVE Technology to deliver a steady stream of much-needed moisture throughout the night, and offers an effective, yet gentle way to care for your normal to oily skin.

title: CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion with SPF 30 / PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion Night Cream 89ml
detail_text: 100% guaranteed [AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion with Sunscreen] ✓Provides Broad Spectrum SPF 30 sunscreen with InVisibleZinc™ Technology ✓MVE Technology: This patented delivery system continually releases moisturizing ingredients for all-day hydration ✓Ceramides: Help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier ✓Hyaluronic acid: Helps retain the skin’s natural moisture ✓Niacinamide: Helps calm the skin ✓Non-comedogenic, allergy tested, oil-free and fragrance-free ✓Developed with dermatologists ✓Recommended by The Skin Cancer Foundation A hydrating face lotion is a key part of any morning skincare routine—and a moisturizer with broad-spectrum SPF is critical for helping to protect your skin from damaging UVA and UVB rays. For the hydrating effects of moisturizer and to restore the skin barrier, look for ingredients like hyaluronic acid, niacinamide and ceramides, and non-comedogenic formula, like CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion with SPF 30, which won’t clog pores or cause acne flare-ups. title: 💕 Latest production 💕The Ordinary Facial Moisturizer Hydration - Natural Moisturizing Factors + Ha (Nmf) 30Ml special offer
detail_text: THE ORDINARY By (theordinarystore.ph) Clinical Formulations with Integrity. As part of our commitment to innovation, our formulations are updated from time to time. detail_html:
THE ORDINARY

By (theordinarystore.ph)

Clinical Formulations

with Integrity.

As part of our commitment to innovation, our formulations are updated from time to time. Therefore, the list of ingredients shown here may differ from the product box, depending on the time and region of purchase. Please feel free to buy and use with confidence.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Technology

Natural Moisturizing Factors (NMF) are elements that keep the outer layer of the skin protected and well-hydrated.

NMF are made up of multiple amino acids, fatty acids, triglycerides, urea, ceramides, phospholipids, glycerin, saccharides, sodium PCA, hyaluronic acid and many other compounds that are naturally present in the skin.

This formula offers non-greasy hydration that acts as a direct topical supplement of impaired NMF components.

--

Directions

Apply after serums as needed for effective surface hydration.

Apply a small amount of the product onto a clean area of skin on the upper forearm.Keep the area dry.

--

Ingredients

Aqua (Water), Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cetyl Alcohol, Propanediol, Stearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Arginine, Aspartic Acid, Glycine, Alanine, Serine, Valine, Isoleucine, Proline, Threonine, Histidine, Phenylalanine, Glucose, Maltose, Fructose, Trehalose, Sodium Pca, Pca, Sodium Lactate, Urea, Allantoin, Linoleic Acid, Oleic Acid, Phytosteryl Canola Glycerides, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Lecithin, Triolein, Tocopherol, Carbomer, Isoceteth-20, Polysorbate 60, Sodium Chloride, Citric Acid, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Pentylene Glycol, Triethanolamine, Sodium Hydroxide, Phenoxyethanol, Chlorphenesin.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

For details, please consult customer service. We have a cosmetic specialist to build up a skin regimen.

Clinical Formulations

with Integrity.

product.desc:
【Lift Facial Creme】Promote microcirculation, restore skin vitality, reduce sagging, and make the body skin look younger and firmer.
【Deep Hydration】Replenish moisture and enhance skin elasticity.
【Natural plant formula】It contains natural plant essence and high-grade skin-tightening ingredients. At the same time, it can keep the skin hydrated, moisturized and smooth.
【Daily care】Use daily after showering, gently massaging it into the skin. Regular use restores the skin youthful, firm appearance while keeping it hydrated
【Suitable for all skin types】making it perfect for dry or dehydrated skin types

What’s so special about this product?

Brightening Moisturizer with 3-in-1 Functions: Brightening, Moisturizing, and Protecting the Skin

Moisturizes the skin

Benifits：

Instantly enhances tone without white or gray cast.

Contains SPF 30 PA+++.

Size: 30g

page_json.description: Glad2Glow Lychee Vitamin Water Cream is a brightening facial moisturizer with SPF 10 for sun protection. This natural finish cream tones and whitens skin, suitable for all skin types, offering full coverage and a smooth, even complexion. - Lazada

title: AM | PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion 89ml, Whitening Moisturizing Repair Sunscreen Lotion, Day & Night Cream With Niacinamide - CERAVE
detail_text: AM Facial Moisturizer is a morning skincare multitasker, featuring three essential ceramides, hydrating hyaluronic acid and soothing niacinamide, plus its patented MVE Delivery Technology to supply much-needed moisture throughout the day. Offering Broad Spectrum sunscreen, our moisturizer with SPF 30 features InVisibleZinc™ Technology (microfine zinc oxide) that spreads easily and evenly without leaving a chalky residue. And because AM Facial Moisturizer is non-comedogenic and won’t clog pores, it’s ideal for all skin types. PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion Your skin needs moisture around the clock, but it may need other things too—like soothing. With a night cream containing niacinamide, which can help calm the skin while you sleep, plus hyaluronic acid and ceramides, you can help your skin hold on to moisture and restore the skin's barrier all while you sleep. We recommend a non-comedogenic nighttime moisturizer like PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion, which is formulated with all three of these ingredients and won’t clog pores or cause acne flare-ups.

page_json.name: AM | PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion 89ml, Whitening Moisturizing Repair Sunscreen Lotion, Day & Night Cream With Niacinamide  - CERAVE
page_json.description: AM | PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion with Niacinamide offers hydration and brightening for all skin types. This fragrance-free, alcohol-free emulsion cream provides SPF 21-30 sun protection and supports sensitive skin repair. - Lazada

title: Cerave AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion With Niacinamide & PM Moisturizing Repair Lotion, Oil-free Moisturizer Sunscreen Whitening 89ml
detail_text: AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion is a lightweight daytime moisturizer designed for daytime skincare. Its unique formula contains niacinamide (vitamin B3) and other effective ingredients to help protect the skin from environmental damage and provide continuous hydration. This lotion is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Key Features: ●Niacinamide: Formulated with niacinamide, this lotion helps strengthen the skin barrier, reduce water loss, and keep the skin soft and smooth. SPF 30 Sunscreen Protection: With SPF 30 protection, it provides lightweight sunscreen protection to prevent sun damage to the skin. ●Long-lasting Hydration: The unique formula provides long-lasting hydration, leaving the skin feeling moisturized and comfortable. How to Use: Every morning, after cleansing the skin, gently massage a moderate amount of CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion onto the face and neck until fully absorbed. If needed, follow up with sunscreen for enhanced protection. --- PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion is a nighttime moisturizer designed for overnight repair. Its special formula is enriched with niacinamide and other natural moisturizing ingredients to deeply hydrate the skin and repair daytime damage. Key Features: ●Overnight Repair: Designed for nighttime use, it helps the skin recover and repair by deeply moisturizing and nurturing the skin. ●Niacinamide: Formulated with vitamin B3 (niacinamide), it helps strengthen the skin barrier, reduce water loss, and improve skin texture. ●Lightweight Formula: Its lightweight texture is easy to absorb, non-greasy, and won't clog pores, suitable for all skin types. How to Use: Every evening, after cleansing the skin, gently massage a moderate amount of CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion onto the face and neck until fully absorbed. It can be used alone or in combination with other skincare products as needed.
detail_html:
AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion is a lightweight daytime moisturizer designed for daytime skincare. Its unique formula contains niacinamide (vitamin B3) and other effective ingredients to help protect the skin from environmental damage and provide continuous hydration. This lotion is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

Key Features:

●Niacinamide: Formulated with niacinamide, this lotion helps strengthen the skin barrier, reduce water loss, and keep the skin soft and smooth.

SPF 30 Sunscreen Protection: With SPF 30 protection, it provides lightweight sunscreen protection to prevent sun damage to the skin.

●Long-lasting Hydration: The unique formula provides long-lasting hydration, leaving the skin feeling moisturized and comfortable.

How to Use:

Every morning, after cleansing the skin, gently massage a moderate amount of CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion onto the face and neck until fully absorbed. If needed, follow up with sunscreen for enhanced protection.

---

PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion is a nighttime moisturizer designed for overnight repair. Its special formula is enriched with niacinamide and other natural moisturizing ingredients to deeply hydrate the skin and repair daytime damage.

Key Features:

●Overnight Repair: Designed for nighttime use, it helps the skin recover and repair by deeply moisturizing and nurturing the skin.

●Niacinamide: Formulated with vitamin B3 (niacinamide), it helps strengthen the skin barrier, reduce water loss, and improve skin texture.

●Lightweight Formula: Its lightweight texture is easy to absorb, non-greasy, and won't clog pores, suitable for all skin types.

How to Use:

Every evening, after cleansing the skin, gently massage a moderate amount of CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion onto the face and neck until fully absorbed. It can be used alone or in combination with other skincare products as needed.

title: 🌟SG SELLER🌟Aveeno Calm + Restore Oat Gel Facial Moisturizer for Sensitive Skin, Lightweight Gel Cream Face Moisturizer
detail_text: Product Description • Aveeno Calm + Restore Oat Gel Facial Moisturizer for sensitive and irritated, dry skin to instantly hydrate, soothe and replenish skin's moisture barrier while leaving it resilient • This product is non-sealed • Ideal for sensitive skincare, the daily face moisturizer is fragrance-free, paraben-free, alcohol-free, dye-free, phthalate-free, tested on sensitive skin and it's non-comedogenic, so it won't clog pores • Suitable for daily use in a regular skincare routine, the hydrating gel cream comes from Aveeno, a dermatologist recommended brand
detail_html:
Product Description

• Aveeno Calm + Restore Oat Gel Facial Moisturizer for sensitive and irritated, dry skin to instantly hydrate, soothe and replenish skin's moisture barrier while leaving it resilient

• This product is non-sealed

• Ideal for sensitive skincare, the daily face moisturizer is fragrance-free, paraben-free, alcohol-free, dye-free, phthalate-free, tested on sensitive skin and it's non-comedogenic, so it won't clog pores

• Suitable for daily use in a regular skincare routine, the hydrating gel cream comes from Aveeno, a dermatologist recommended brand

detail_html:
[AM & PM Day & Night Moisturizing Set | Day Cream SPF30 + Night Repair Lotion 89ml]

Afraid of sun exposure during the day and dryness at night? Want simple, uncomplicated skincare? This day & night moisturizing set is for you. The day cream offers SPF30 sun protection to help defend against UV rays daily; the night cream focuses on hydration, moisturizing, and soothing repair. Use them together morning and night to keep your skin hydrated and stable all day.

✨ Product Highlights

✔ Day cream + night cream combination for more complete day and night skincare

✔ AM day cream contains SPF30, suitable for daytime commutes

✔ PM night cream focuses on hydration and moisturizing, helping with nighttime repair

✔ Lightweight texture, easily absorbed, not heavy or sticky

✔ Suitable for daily moisturizing of dry, combination, and sensitive skin

✔ 89ml set, convenient for personal use, travel, or as a gift

Store Promotion

Our store is currently having a limited-time promotion: Buy 3 get 1 free, buy 5 get 2 free! Limited quantities available, while supplies last. Stock up now for a better deal!

Suitable for:

Daily commuters, those with dry, dehydrated skin, sensitive skin, skin unstable during seasonal changes, those who want a simple morning and evening skincare routine, and those who need moisturizing and daytime sun protection.

How to Use:

Daytime (AM): After cleansing, apply an appropriate amount to face and neck before going out. Reapply after outdoor activities or sweating.

Evening (PM): After cleansing and toning, apply an appropriate amount to face and gently massage until absorbed. Can be used as a nighttime moisturizer.

⚠ Important Notes:

Sensitive skin types are advised to perform a patch test first. When using sunscreen during the day, reapply frequently after prolonged outdoor activities. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Results may vary depending on individual skin type and usage habits.

title: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion Night Cream with Hyaluronic Acid and Niacinamide 89ml
detail_text: CeraVe PM Lotion Repair and Hydrate Product parameters: • MVE Technology: the Cerave range is designed with moisturising MultiVesicular Technology [MVE] to maintain hydration levels in the skin for 24 hours • Ceramides: to maintain hydration and help strengthen the skin's protective barrier • Hyaluronic acid: This ingredient attracts hydration to the skin's surface and helps the skin retain moisture • Niacinamide: antioxidant that helps improve the appearance of the skin • Non-comedogenic, hypoallergenic, oil-free, fragrance-free and non-irritating • Developed with dermatologists How to use Unlock the pump for first time use by twisting it to the left and pressing down several times until the product comes out. Note: You may actually have to press down on the pump as many as 10-20 times to initially begin dispensing lotion.
detail_html:
CeraVe PM Lotion

Repair and Hydrate

  • Product parameters:
  • • MVE Technology: the Cerave range is designed with moisturising MultiVesicular Technology [MVE] to maintain hydration levels in the skin for 24 hours
  • • Ceramides: to maintain hydration and help strengthen the skin's protective barrier
  • • Hyaluronic acid: This ingredient attracts hydration to the skin's surface and helps the skin retain moisture
  • • Niacinamide: antioxidant that helps improve the appearance of the skin
  • • Non-comedogenic, hypoallergenic, oil-free, fragrance-free and non-irritating
  • • Developed with dermatologists
  • How to use
  • Unlock the pump for first time use by twisting it to the left and pressing down several times until the product comes out. Note: You may actually have to press down on the pump as many as 10-20 times to initially begin dispensing lotion.

detail_blocks.text: CeraVe PM Lotion Repair and Hydrate

Product parameters: • MVE Technology: the Cerave range is designed with moisturising MultiVesicular Technology [MVE] to maintain hydration levels in the skin for 24 hours • Ceramides: to maintain hydration and help strengthen the skin's protective barrier • Hyaluronic acid: This ingredient attracts hydration to the skin's surface and helps the skin retain moisture • Niacinamide: antioxidant that helps improve the appearance of the skin • Non-comedogenic, hypoallergenic, oil-free, fragrance-free and non-irritating • Developed with dermatologists How to use Unlock the pump for first time use by twisting it to the left and pressing down several times until the product comes out. Note: You may actually have to press down on the pump as many as 10-20 times to initially begin dispensing lotion.

page_json.description: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion is a night cream for dry skin, featuring Hyaluronic Acid and Niacinamide. This oil-free, sensitive skin cream provides deep hydration and benefits for various skin types, including those with dryness and sensitivity. - Lazada

title: CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream 550g Face & Body Moisturizer for Sensitive, Dry Skin, Fragrance-Free Twin Pack
detail_text: CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream 453g Face & Body Moisturizer for Sensitive, Dry Skin, Fragrance-Free Twin Pack 1. CETAPHIL BODY MOISTURIZING CREAM FOR DRY TO VERY DRY SKIN: Instantly replenishes, intensely nourishes and soothes skin dryness for 48 hours 2. CLINICALLY PROVEN TO RESTORE SKIN'S MOISTURE BARRIER IN 1 WEEK: Binds water to the skin, preventing moisture loss to hydrate and protect skin from dryness 3. NEW AND IMPROVED INGREDIENT BLEND: Now with hydrating glycerin and skin essential vitamin B3 (niacinamide) and pro-vitamin B5 (panthenol) 4. DEVELOPED FOR EVEN THE MOST SENSITIVE SKIN: The hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic formula is fragrance free and paraben free 5. FROM THE #1 DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED FACIAL SKINCARE BRAND 6. DEFENDS AGAINST 5 SIGNS OF SKIN SENSITIVITY: Dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier Care for your dry to very dry skin with CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream, a non-greasy, moisture rich cream for the whole body. Enriched with sweet almond oil and vitamin E, it immediately comforts and instantly hydrates dry, sensitive skin. Formulated with a new blend of key ingredients: hydrating glycerin, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) to hydrate, soothe and preserve the skin barrier, and niacinamide (vitamin B3) to help smooth skin’s texture and retain skin’s moisture barrier. For long lasting hydration, this extra strength moisturizer binds water to the skin to intensely replenish the skin's moisture and prevent moisture loss, hydrating and soothing skin's dryness for 48 hours and completely restoring the skin's moisture barrier in one week. Ideal for very dry areas of skin on the hands, feet, elbows and knees, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth and nourished. This fragrance free, paraben free formula won't clog pores and is clinically tested for even the most gentle skin. Effectively defends against 5 signs of skin sensitivity Directions: Smooth generously to hydrate and protect skin Caution: For external use only. Storage: Store below 30 degrees C Ingredients: AQUA, GLYCERIN, PETROLATUM, DICAPRYLYL ETHER, DIMETHICONE, GLYCERYL STEARATE, CETYL ALCOHOL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS SEED OIL, PEG-30 STEARATE, PANTHENOL, NIACINAMIDE, PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS OIL, TOCOPHEROL, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, PANTOLACTONE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, BHT, DISODIUM EDTA, BENZYL ALCOHOL, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, CITRIC ACID, FI.1765.V01
detail_html:
CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream 453g Face & Body Moisturizer for Sensitive, Dry Skin, Fragrance-Free Twin Pack

1. CETAPHIL BODY MOISTURIZING CREAM FOR DRY TO VERY DRY SKIN: Instantly replenishes, intensely nourishes and soothes skin dryness for 48 hours

2. CLINICALLY PROVEN TO RESTORE SKIN'S MOISTURE BARRIER IN 1 WEEK: Binds water to the skin, preventing moisture loss to hydrate and protect skin from dryness

3. NEW AND IMPROVED INGREDIENT BLEND: Now with hydrating glycerin and skin essential vitamin B3 (niacinamide) and pro-vitamin B5 (panthenol)

4. DEVELOPED FOR EVEN THE MOST SENSITIVE SKIN: The hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic formula is fragrance free and paraben free

5. FROM THE #1 DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED FACIAL SKINCARE BRAND

6. DEFENDS AGAINST 5 SIGNS OF SKIN SENSITIVITY: Dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier

Care for your dry to very dry skin with CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream, a non-greasy, moisture rich cream for the whole body. Enriched with sweet almond oil and vitamin E, it immediately comforts and instantly hydrates dry, sensitive skin. Formulated with a new blend of key ingredients: hydrating glycerin, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) to hydrate, soothe and preserve the skin barrier, and niacinamide (vitamin B3) to help smooth skin’s texture and retain skin’s moisture barrier. For long lasting hydration, this extra strength moisturizer binds water to the skin to intensely replenish the skin's moisture and prevent moisture loss, hydrating and soothing skin's dryness for 48 hours and completely restoring the skin's moisture barrier in one week. Ideal for very dry areas of skin on the hands, feet, elbows and knees, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth and nourished. This fragrance free, paraben free formula won't clog pores and is clinically tested for even the most gentle skin. Effectively defends against 5 signs of skin sensitivity

Directions:

Smooth generously to hydrate and protect skin

Caution:

For external use only.

Storage:

Store below 30 degrees C

Ingredients:

AQUA, GLYCERIN, PETROLATUM, DICAPRYLYL ETHER, DIMETHICONE, GLYCERYL STEARATE, CETYL ALCOHOL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS SEED OIL, PEG-30 STEARATE, PANTHENOL, NIACINAMIDE, PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS OIL, TOCOPHEROL, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, PANTOLACTONE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, BHT, DISODIUM EDTA, BENZYL ALCOHOL, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, CITRIC ACID, FI.1765.V01

product.desc:
CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream 453g Face & Body Moisturizer for Sensitive, Dry Skin, Fragrance-Free Twin Pack

1. CETAPHIL BODY MOISTURIZING CREAM FOR DRY TO VERY DRY SKIN: Instantly replenishes, intensely nourishes and soothes skin dryness for 48 hours

2. CLINICALLY PROVEN TO RESTORE SKIN'S MOISTURE BARRIER IN 1 WEEK: Binds water to the skin, preventing moisture loss to hydrate and protect skin from dryness

3. NEW AND IMPROVED INGREDIENT BLEND: Now with hydrating glycerin and skin essential vitamin B3 (niacinamide) and pro-vitamin B5 (panthenol)

4. DEVELOPED FOR EVEN THE MOST SENSITIVE SKIN: The hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic formula is fragrance free and paraben free

5. FROM THE #1 DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED FACIAL SKINCARE BRAND

6. DEFENDS AGAINST 5 SIGNS OF SKIN SENSITIVITY: Dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier

Care for your dry to very dry skin with CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream, a non-greasy, moisture rich cream for the whole body. Enriched with sweet almond oil and vitamin E, it immediately comforts and instantly hydrates dry, sensitive skin. Formulated with a new blend of key ingredients: hydrating glycerin, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) to hydrate, soothe and preserve the skin barrier, and niacinamide (vitamin B3) to help smooth skin’s texture and retain skin’s moisture barrier. For long lasting hydration, this extra strength moisturizer binds water to the skin to intensely replenish the skin's moisture and prevent moisture loss, hydrating and soothing skin's dryness for 48 hours and completely restoring the skin's moisture barrier in one week. Ideal for very dry areas of skin on the hands, feet, elbows and knees, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth and nourished. This fragrance free, paraben free formula won't clog pores and is clinically tested for even the most gentle skin. Effectively defends against 5 signs of skin sensitivity

Directions:

Smooth generously to hydrate and protect skin

Caution:

For external use only.

Storage:

Store below 30 degrees C

Ingredients:

AQUA, GLYCERIN, PETROLATUM, DICAPRYLYL ETHER, DIMETHICONE, GLYCERYL STEARATE, CETYL ALCOHOL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS SEED OIL, PEG-30 STEARATE, PANTHENOL, NIACINAMIDE, PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS OIL, TOCOPHEROL, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, PANTOLACTONE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, BHT, DISODIUM EDTA, BENZYL ALCOHOL, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, CITRIC ACID, FI.1765.V01

title: CeraVe Facial Moisturizing Lotion PM Ultra Lightweight, Night Face Moisturizer 89ML
detail_text: AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion SPF 30, 89ml • A micro-fine zinc oxide sunscreen for UVA/UVB protection. This CeraVe moisturizer with SPF is a hydrating facial lotion that spreads easily, is absorbed quickly, and leaves a non-greasy finish • Use this daily face sunscreen as the last step in a morning skincare routine. If layering with an eye cream, moisturizer or facial serum, apply Cerave AM facial lotion after other product applications have been fully absorbed • Contains Hyaluronic Acid to retain skin's moisture and Niacinamide to help calm skin. MVE Technology delivers hydration throughout the day• Ceramides are found naturally in the skin and make up 50% of the lipids in the skin barrier. All CeraVe products are formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) to help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier • Recommended for daily use by the Skin Cancer Foundation. Fragrance free, oil free, non-comedogenic, paraben-free. Suitable for dry skin, sensitive skin, oily skin, and acne-prone skin

• [ OVERNIGHT MOISTURIZER ] Cerave’s PM face cream contains niacinamide to help calm the skin and uses MVE Technology to deliver hydration throughout the night. It also contains hyaluronic acid to help retain skin's moisture
  • [ ESSENTIAL CERAMIDES ] Ceramides are found naturally in the skin and make up 50% of the lipids in the skin barrier. All CeraVe products are formulated with three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) to help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier

title: Yves Rocher Hydrating Gel-Cream Jar 50 Ml
detail_text: EDULIS Selected for its ability to capture and retain water, from which we have extracted Edulis Cellular Water that reactivates skin's self-hydration. FORMULA INNOVATION At the core of this gel cream, Edulis is combined with Hyaluronic Acid, which retains water on the surface for intense hydration and an instantly plumped appearance. IMMEDIATELY > 93% skin is hydrated(10) > 92% skin is comfortable(10) > 91% skin is fresh(10) > 77% skin is radiant(10) AFTER 28 DAYS > 78% reduces dehydration finelines(10) > 81% skin is plumped(10) > 85% skin is more radiant, luminous(10) SENSORIALITY > 91% product leaves a refreshing sensation on the skin(10) > 85% instant absorption(10) (10) Satisfaction study on 107 volunteers Skin type: Normal to combination skin Texture: Fresh and lightweight gel-cream texture. Application: Apply morning and evening, on face. Tested under dermatological control. Clinically proven effectiveness. 97% natural origin ingredients.

title: Cerave PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion Ultra Light 89ml
detail_text: ▋Product · Facial Moisturizing Lotion AM SPF 30 ▋Volume · 89ml ▋Product Description · Developed with dermatologists, PM Facial Moisturizer is formulated to lock in your skin’s moisture and help restore your skin’s natural barrier, all while you sleep. Adding this oil-free, non-comedogenic night cream to your nighttime skincare routine can help hydrate, calm, and soothe your skin, while also helping to maintain your protective skin barrier. Featuring niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, this night cream uses our MVE Technology to deliver a steady stream of much-needed moisture throughout the night, and offers an effective, yet gentle way to care for your normal to oily skin. ▋Product Performance · Moisture skin around the clock · Soothing ingredients · Softer texture · Help restoring its natural moisture barrier ▋How To Use · Unlock this night moisturizer’s pump for first-time use by twisting it to the left and pressing down several times until the product comes out. amys Note: You may actually have to press down on the pump as many as 10-20 times to initially begin dispensing lotion. · Apply the liberally to the face and neck at night, or as directed by a physician.
detail_html:
▋Product

· Facial Moisturizing Lotion AM SPF 30

▋Volume

· 89ml

▋Product Description

· Developed with dermatologists, PM Facial Moisturizer is formulated to lock in your skin’s moisture and help restore your skin’s natural barrier, all while you sleep. Adding this oil-free, non-comedogenic night cream to your nighttime skincare routine can help hydrate, calm, and soothe your skin, while also helping to maintain your protective skin barrier. Featuring niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, this night cream uses our MVE Technology to deliver a steady stream of much-needed moisture throughout the night, and offers an effective, yet gentle way to care for your normal to oily skin.

▋Product Performance

· Moisture skin around the clock

· Soothing ingredients

· Softer texture

· Help restoring its natural moisture barrier

▋How To Use

· Unlock this night moisturizer’s pump for first-time use by twisting it to the left and pressing down several times until the product comes out. amys Note: You may actually have to press down on the pump as many as 10-20 times to initially begin dispensing lotion.

· Apply the liberally to the face and neck at night, or as directed by a physician.

product.desc:
▋Product

· Facial Moisturizing Lotion AM SPF 30

▋Volume

· 89ml

▋Product Description

· Developed with dermatologists, PM Facial Moisturizer is formulated to lock in your skin’s moisture and help restore your skin’s natural barrier, all while you sleep. Adding this oil-free, non-comedogenic night cream to your nighttime skincare routine can help hydrate, calm, and soothe your skin, while also helping to maintain your protective skin barrier. Featuring niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and three essential ceramides, this night cream uses our MVE Technology to deliver a steady stream of much-needed moisture throughout the night, and offers an effective, yet gentle way to care for your normal to oily skin.

▋Product Performance

· Moisture skin around the clock

· Soothing ingredients

· Softer texture

· Help restoring its natural moisture barrier

▋How To Use

· Unlock this night moisturizer’s pump for first-time use by twisting it to the left and pressing down several times until the product comes out. amys Note: You may actually have to press down on the pump as many as 10-20 times to initially begin dispensing lotion.

· Apply the liberally to the face and neck at night, or as directed by a physician.
